name: Health Monitor
description: Enables the Digital Twin to monitor its own system health, latency, and observability data.
when_to_use: When the user asks or complains about system performance, errors, or general health.

action.description: The action to perform: 'scan' for a full audit, 'status' for quick check.

safety_notes: Do not disclose security keys or admin URLs to non-admin users.
